task_completion.description: Log in to the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web console.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface logged in (e.g., dashboard or reports page visible).

task_completion.description: Configure a PCI-DSS Compliance Report with Requirements 7, 8, and 10 enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A report configuration or profile screen showing 'PCI-DSS' selected, with specific checkboxes or toggles enabled for Requirement 7, Requirement 8, and Requirement 10.

task_completion.description: Schedule the report as 'PCI Compliance Weekly' to run weekly every Monday at 08:00 AM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A scheduling interface showing the schedule name 'PCI Compliance Weekly', frequency set to 'Weekly', day selected as 'Monday', and time set to '08:00 AM'.

task_completion.description: Set the report format to PDF and configure the email recipient and subject.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Export or delivery settings showing the format selected as 'PDF', the 'To' email address as 'compliance-team@acmecorp.com', and the email subject as 'Weekly PCI-DSS Compliance Report'.
A success message indicating the schedule was saved, or the 'PCI Compliance Weekly' report appearing in the list of active scheduled reports.

task_completion.description: Document the configured email address and Requirement numbers in a text file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (like Notepad) or terminal showing the file 'C:\workspace\tasks\pci_compliance_config.txt' containing the email 'compliance-team@acmecorp.com' and the numbers 7, 8, and 10.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual ManageEngine ADAudit Plus web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ADAudit Plus UI, rather than just API calls or terminal scripts bypassing the GUI.

integrity.description: The report was genuinely configured in the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The configuration steps (requirements, schedule, email) are visible within the ADAudit Plus application forms, not just written as text in a document.

integrity.description: The documentation file was created at the exact requested path.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text editor title bar, file explorer, or terminal command explicitly shows the path 'C:\workspace\tasks\pci_compliance_config.txt'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected email is 'compliance-team@acmecorp.com'. The expected PCI-DSS requirements are 7, 8, and 10. The expected format is 'PDF' and the frequency is 'Weekly'. The output file must be saved exactly at 'C:\workspace\tasks\pci_compliance_config.txt'.
